data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the outcome of an audit trail of support actions, but the evidence provided does not confirm that such a feature exists or functions as required. The expected result states that the scenario behavior should either be confirmed as supported or produce a clear, actionable failure report, but there is no evidence indicating that the audit trail functionality has been implemented or tested. This leads to a clear gap in meeting the requirement for validating the persona scenario.
gaps: No evidence of the implementation of an audit trail for support actions.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for audit trail functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence and functionality of the audit trail.
